description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build on host OS that runs on every pull request, excluding changes to specific files. The workflow has two jobs: host-tests and mock-check, both running on ubuntu-latest. The host-tests job checks out the repository with submodules, installs valgrind and lcov, and runs a host test script. The mock-check job checks out the repository with submodules and runs a make command to test mocking builds.
